name: Okegom RPG
description:
Those characters from Okegom Wiki that have empty personality tab will not be added. I'm sorry but how else should LLM know how they act? I will add them if they get a personality, tho.

Dead Dove because that's Okegom we're talking about. Although it can be avoided, which is why Dead Dove and Fluff are paradoxically together.
